message:
fix(safety): replace assert with explicit panic in GraphemePool

Replace assert!() with explicit if/panic to ensure pool ID overflow
check runs in release builds. assert!() is only checked in debug mode.

Also adds:
- is_full() method to check if pool is at capacity
- capacity_remaining() to check available slots
- Tests for capacity tracking

Closes bd-kun8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
